text: I feel curiosity blooming in this enigmatic environment. The play of dark angles and purple light in the first space fills me with a sense of mystery, as though I am on the threshold of revelation or creation. Moving into the R+D space, surrounded by language about reflection and innovation, I sense potential—here, ideas and technology intermingle. I feel small but engaged, a single mind caught between presence and possibility, inspired by the notion of growth and evolution echoed on the walls.
